name: Lemon-Sesame Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the tough ends of the asparagus.
2. Remove the scales, if desired.
3. Steam the asparagus for 4 minutes or until it is crisp tender. Set aside and keep warm.
4. In a small bowl, combine the rice wine vinegar, water, dark sesame oil, and lemon juice. Stir well to mix.
5. Pour the mixture over the asparagus and toss gently to coat.
6. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and garnish with lemon rind, if desired.
